sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD SYNC_STATUS_ENABLED CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N'
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD SYNC_STATUS_ENABLED CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N'

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD SANKHYA_SERVER_URL VARCHAR2(300)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD SANKHYA_SERVER_URL VARCHAR(300)

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD SANKHYA_USER VARCHAR2(100)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD SANKHYA_USER VARCHAR(100)

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD SANKHYA_PASSWORD VARCHAR2(200)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD SANKHYA_PASSWORD VARCHAR(200)
